ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the mortality data */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic segment (sex) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given demographic and year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the record */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the corresponding year and demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., state or region) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death (e.g., Neoplasms) */,
  "parent_cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent cause */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_of_death_parent_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, WHO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year (e.g., 1980, 1981) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each mortality record
Reference to the location of the mortality data
Reference to the cause of death
Reference to the year of the data
Total population for the given demographic and year
Last update time of the record
Mortality rate for the corresponding year and demographic

Unique identifier for each cause of death
Name of the cause of death (e.g., Neoplasms)
ICD code for the cause of death
Detailed description of the cause of death
Unique identifier for each sex category
Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female)
Unique identifier for each age group
Unique identifier for each data source
Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, WHO)
